description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow enclosed within a rectangular perimeter fence, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels. The structure has a flat roof with a rooftop terrace area, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small set of steps leading to a central door. The property includes a driveway with a covered carport on one side and an open patio or recreational area on the other. The exterior is predominantly smooth and light-colored, with minimalistic lines and a strong emphasis on geometric forms. The windows are arranged in broad horizontal bands, maximizing natural light and providing expansive views from the interior.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with large glass windows, a flat roof, and a fenced yard featuring a carport and patio area.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an angled perspective, highlighting the carport, rooftop terrace, and the extensive use of glass on the upper and lower floors.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade, emphasizing the main entrance, steps, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the bungalow, focusing on the carport, the flat roof, and the open patio area.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite end of the bungalow, with the patio area, central entrance, and the geometric layout of the windows and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large horizontal bands of windows
